content: Just deployed a new microservice using Go and Docker. The performance improvements are incredible - 10x faster response times compared to the previous Node.js implementation.
Exploring ant colony optimization algorithms for Dota 2 match prediction. The results so far are promising - 78% accuracy on test data.
Refactored the entire authentication system to use JWT with refresh tokens. Much cleaner architecture now.
Started learning Rust for systems programming. The ownership model is challenging but powerful.
Completed the CI/CD pipeline setup with GitHub Actions. Automated testing and deployment to AWS ECS.
